Definition.text: Attack is a skill class that routes weapon-based damage through attack delivery mechanics.

Purpose.text: Route actions through weapon-based hit/deal and accuracy-dependent pipelines.

Core Rules.text: A skill uses Attack class when it is classified as attack-based and weapon-based; this is not equivalent to Melee.
Core Rules.source: Path of Exile gameplay discussion and Mark_GGG references

Internal Rules.text: Attack modifiers apply on the attack pipeline and can coexist with non-attack sub-components only when explicitly defined by the skill text.

Calculation Order.text: 1) attack validation 2) accuracy/evasion checks 3) hit checks 4) damage and secondary effects, then attack-class modifiers.
Calculation Order.source: community-accessible official defensive/hit flow thread (official forum)

Priority Rules.text: Specific skill components can route partial damage to non-attack subpaths (e.g., attack explosions as spell damage).

Preconditions.text: Action must consume skill state that is weapon-based rather than purely cast-based.

Postconditions.text: Attack-only scaling and passives can apply; attack-specific defensive checks (accuracy, evasion interactions) are eligible if referenced by mechanics.

Limitations.text: Not all weapon interactions are Attack for unarmed or shield-based edge-cases, and not all attack-tagged output is guaranteed weapon base.

Caps.text: No global cap for Attack keyword itself.

Formula.text: No standalone formula for Attack keyword; attack-related modifiers are applied in their pipeline.

text: Weapon Damage assumptions on unsupported skills
Some explicit skills are attacks but include secondary components treated as Spell damage.
Exceptions.source: Mark_GGG quote on explosive/ infernal blow

Hidden Rules.text: Keep Attack and Weapon Damage separate: Weapon Damage may not cover all non-spell cases; use explicit skill text to resolve.

Developer Notes.text: Prefer explicit skill component tagging in normalized model rather than deriving all outputs from the base class.

Historical Changes.text: No explicit patch-scoped redefinition for Attack class found in this batch.

text.note: Attack remains a non-spell weapon-derived skill class unless explicitly overridden by component text.

text: Glacial Hammer is an attack and is not affected by spell damage increases unless the damage portion is spell-tagged.
A bow attack skill that uses the bow base is an attack and can still gain spell interactions from special non-weapon components if defined.
Spell and Attack can be treated as interchangeable
